root_cause: Attribute naming mismatch - used shadowMapEnabled/shadowMapType instead of shadowMap-enabled/shadowMap-type
fix_applied: Changed shadowMapEnabled to shadowMap-enabled and shadowMapType to shadowMap-type on webglRenderer component
change_description: Fixed JSX attribute naming to use kebab-case (shadowMap-enabled, shadowMap-type) instead of camelCase (shadowMapEnabled, shadowMapType). This matches the Three.js property binding convention used by @woby/three.
